narrative:
Hancock County has 49,617 registered voters, with 50.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.2 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 28.2% of registrants.
